## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 18, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Alexis Blevins_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "keeps lagging out the chats forget what i respond and the story line and the chatacters dont remmember what move they cam from or show"
            2. _Wisby Fertilien_, Jul 18, 2026, 2/5: "honestly I think it's really good it's better than all the ones I've been to and even when you get ads it's less than 10 seconds 😲 you should really give this app a try have fun if you do it's really immersive and it does not forget characters if there's a lot of characters in one story it doesn't just forget it mid-story it's really good and it has great memory the responses come immediate and it's very detailed if you like a good read, I don't know why but it's acting really slow ((updated//"
            3. _Alifahmy Odag_, Jul 18, 2026, 2/5: "I'm starting to not like the new updates. Back then I could chat for hours nonstop, now, just a few minutes in I'm starting to crash. I can't even find a solid bot without crashing. I have to constantly clear cache and storage just to run it smoothly for a while and I have to do it again when it gets laggy, sometimes it becomes a waste of time rather than relaxation because of this lag. Please do something about it."
